basics.name: Giorgi Dundua
basics.label: Software Engineer (Backend/DevOps)
summary: Software Engineer and Chalmers alumni pivoting from Technical Delivery to hands-on DevOps & Python roles. Experience in Dockerized Flask applications, GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines, and Pandas data workflows. Combines engineering discipline with business acumen to deliver production-grade solutions

skills.name: Languages
keywords: Swedish - Working proficiency in reading and written communication

projects.name: Personal Data Platform
highlights: Architected a stateless, idempotent DAG pipeline to ingest and normalize heterogeneous health telemetry (API & CSV)
Implemented Atomic I/O patterns (Write-Ahead Log) and Content-Addressable Caching to ensure data integrity and zero redundant compute
Engineered a distributed state synchronization system using Google Drive as a data lake, enabling stateless execution across Docker and GitHub Actions
Deployed a dual-mode Streamlit dashboard via CI/CD pipelines, featuring secure authentication and automated mock data generation for public demos

projects.name: NordTech Corporate Platform
highlights: Containerized a production Flask application using multi-stage Docker builds, optimizing image size for rapid deployment
Architected a CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions for automated, zero-downtime deployments to Fly.io microVMs
Refactored legacy code into the Application Factory Pattern, enforcing strict separation of configuration and secrets (12-Factor App)
Engineered asynchronous background threading for non-blocking email delivery, decoupling I/O operations from the request cycle

work.name: Sabbatical
highlights: Relocated to Sweden and dedicated full-time effort to updating technical skills from legacy stacks to modern Cloud/DevOps patterns
Focus Areas: Python (Pandas/Flask), Containerization (Docker), and CI/CD Automation (GitHub Actions)
Key Achievement: Built and deployed a corporate platform and a data pipeline to demonstrate proficiency in modern software lifecycles (SDLC)

work.name: NordTech Solutions
highlights: Led end-to-end delivery of web platforms, translating client requirements into technical tasks and schedules
Defined system scope, team composition, and delivery timelines with CTO; created tasks in Teamwork
Oversaw quality through manual testing and Selenium automation; managed delivery risks and incidents
Coordinated weekly client meetings, commercial negotiations, and technical hiring (CV screening, interviews)
Travelin.ai: Distributed tasks, reviewed deliverables, led QA/release for corporate travel platform
Vavisjon.no: Tasked Python/React/DevOps team, tested/reviewed user management system delivery

work.name: TIBCO Software Inc.
highlights: Handled complex support cases for TIBCO Spotfire, debugging issues through log analysis, local reproduction, and collaboration with engineering
Delivered solutions and effective workarounds for enterprise customers, consistently meeting SLA expectations and improving customer satisfaction
Contributed to self‑service support by writing and reviewing knowledge base articles and providing solutions in the user community
Worked closely with cross‑functional teams to improve debugging processes and address recurring product issues

work.name: German Butcher LTD
highlights: Worked as a junior backend developer on a custom internal system for production, inventory, budgeting, and reporting
Implemented backend features and business logic under guidance from senior developers, gaining practical experience with real‑world enterprise workflows
Assisted with data handling and basic reporting, improving visibility into production and cost structures

work.name: Gullinbursti LTD
highlights: Built and managed supplier relationships for food production inputs across the EU, focusing on cross‑border imports into Georgia
Conducted supplier research, outreach, and commercial negotiations, coordinating with freight forwarders and local manufacturers
Managed day‑to‑day operations related to deliveries, pricing, and basic financial follow‑up

education.institution: Chalmers University of Technology & University of Gothenburg
highlights: Joint degree with a strong focus on long‑running industrial projects covering the full software development lifecycle
Core areas: software architecture (distributed and embedded), software quality and testing, and process improvement
Developed strong skills at the intersection of technical engineering and change management in software organisations

education.institution: School of Business, Economics and Law, University of Gothenburg
highlights: Studied corporate finance, financial markets, and quantitative analysis, building complementary analytical and business skills
